metadata.name: metadata
metadata.default:
CASE
    WHEN (COALESCE(gp_current_market_id(), ''::text) <> ''::text) THEN jsonb_build_object('gp', jsonb_build_object('market_id', gp_current_market_id()))
    ELSE '{}'::jsonb
END
